debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
inst✝ : NeZero n
⊢ IsCyclic ↥(rootsOfUnity n Circle)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
let M : Type _ := rootsOfUnity n Circle
    have : IsCyclic M := by
      -- Use the fact that roots of unity in ℂ form a cyclic group and the isomorphism between them
      have h₁ : rootsOfUnity n ℂ ≃* rootsOfUnity n Circle := (Circle.rootsOfUnityMulEquiv n).symm
      have h₂ : IsCyclic (rootsOfUnity n ℂ) := by
        -- The roots of unity in ℂ are cyclic
        apply cyclic_of_prime_not_dvd
        <;>
        (try
          {
            norm_num
            <;>
            deduce_instance
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            simp_all [Nat.Prime]
            <;>
            deduce_instance
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            aesop
          })
      -- Since roots of unity in ℂ are cyclic and the groups are isomorphic, roots of unity in Circle are also cyclic
      exact IsCyclic.of_mulEquiv h₁ h₂
    exact this
